actions.name: get_mailbox_settings
actions.description: Get the current Outlook mailbox settings, including automatic replies, locale, time zone, and working hours.

outputSchema.description: Mailbox settings for the current Outlook account.

actions.name: get_profile
actions.description: Get the current Outlook account profile from Microsoft Graph so you can identify the connected mailbox.

id.description: Unique identifier for the current account.

displayName.description: Display name of the current account.

anyOf.description: Primary SMTP address for the current account.

userPrincipalName.description: User principal name for the current account.

actions.name: list_mail_folders
actions.description: List the root-level Outlook mail folders for the connected mailbox, with optional hidden folders and field selection.

nextLink.description: Opaque pagination URL returned by a previous Outlook response.

includeHiddenFolders.description: Whether to include hidden mail folders.

top.description: Maximum number of mail folders to return.

items.description: A string value.

select.description: Mail folder fields to request from Microsoft Graph.

displayName.description: Display name for the mail folder.

items.description: Outlook mail folder resource.

mailFolders.description: Root-level mail folders returned by Outlook.

anyOf.description: Pagination URL for the next page, or null when there is no next page.

actions.name: list_messages
actions.description: List Outlook messages from the mailbox or from a specific mail folder, with support for OData filters, sorting, field selection, and pagination.

top.description: Maximum number of messages to return.

filter.description: OData filter expression for the messages query.

orderby.description: OData orderby expression for the messages query.

items.description: A string value.
